description:
With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2022 BMW X6 M50i, 4.4L TC V8, AWD, 530bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 189,000 or AED 2,961 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 94,022 KM's - BMW Warranty Valid Until 9th February 2027 or 200,000KMs - BMW Service Contract Valid Until 9th February 2027 or 100,000 KMs - Full Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - M Leather Steering Wheel - M Aerodynamics Package - Sky Lounge Panoramic Roof - Smoker Package - Temperature Control Cupholders - Climate Controlled Front Seats - Comfort Seats incl. Memory Function - Seat Heating for Front Seats - Glass Application Crafted Clarity - Automatic 4-Zone Climate Control - Ambient Air Package - Ambient Lighting - Head Up Display - Harmon/Kardon Surround Sound Package - Apple CarPlay - Rear Cabin Entertainment - Wireless Charging - BMW Gesture Control - BMW Laser Light - Parking Assistant Plus - M Sport Brake - M Sport Suspension - Comfort Access System - Soft-Close Doors - Alcantara Headlining - Remote Engine Start - M Sport Exhaust System - 22” Alloy Wheels
